name: roldao-method
description: Framework agentic em PT-BR. 17 agentes, 28 hooks bloqueadores + 7 soft warnings + 7 lifecycle/manutenção + 1 utilitário = 43 hooks em Node puro, 28 workflows, 36 skills BR (19 core + 17 em addons; CPF/CNPJ alfanumérico 2026, chave de acesso NF-e, validador IE/CEP/CNH/RENAVAM/titulo-eleitor/conta-bancaria/PIS/Pix, mascarar dado pessoal LGPD, NF-e imutavel FISCAL-001, contingência SEFAZ FISCAL-004, idempotência Pix PIX-001/003, Reforma Tributária 2026-2033, eSocial, CFM telemedicina, CNS/SUS), 7 addons especializados (6 stable + healthtech-br beta), 9 checklists. 46 regras inegociáveis (INV/SEC/TST/LGPD/FISCAL/PIX/INV-AGENT). Spec-driven com adapters pra Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Roo, Aider, Continue, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI.

scripts.test: npm run validar && npm run validar:ids && npm run validar:cobertura-hooks && npm run lint:self-masking && npm run test:tools && npm run test:claude-md-sync && npm run test:dogfood-sync && npm run test:plugin-manifest-drift && npm run test:lib-contract && npm run test:install-lib && npm run test:install && npm run test:hooks-node-only && npm run test:block-destructive-bypass && npm run test:secrets-scanner-comments && npm run test:auditors-pass && npm run test:checkpoint-marker && npm run test:investigador-gate2 && npm run test:anti-mascaramento-extra && npm run test:mensagens-leigas && npm run test:jargon-expanded && npm run test:session-cleanup && npm run test:audit-sha-story && npm run test:confirmation-extra && npm run test:lib-next-id && npm run test:skills && npm run test:addons && npm run test:adapters && npm run test:agents-commands-statusline
